ogTitle: Mulloon vs Mullumbimby Creek: Climate Safety

heading: Mulloon vs Mullumbimby Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mulloon, New South Wales and Mullumbimby Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mulloon has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Mullumbimby Creek (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mulloon or Mullumbimby Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mulloon has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Mullumbimby Creek scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mulloon scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Mullumbimby Creek scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mulloon or Mullumbimby Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mulloon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
